data.title: Two KOLs lost a total of more than $3.6 million on LIBRA, with a loss of more than 80%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to a post by crypto KOL @Ed_x0101 on the X platform, he bought $1.5 million of LIBRA at a high point before, and subsequently lost nearly $1 million.
According to another post by crypto KOL @XXAntiWar on the X platform, due to buying LIBRA at a high point, he lost about 13,000 SOLs, worth about $2.6 million, and the loss was as high as 79.76%.

data.title: Degods founder Frank made over $510,000 in profit through LIBRA
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Kolscan’s post on the X platform, @frankdegods, @Cupseyy, and @ratwizardx are the top three KOL profit list today. @frankdegods made a profit of about 2,590 SOLs with LIBRA, worth $514,300; @Cupseyy made a profit of over $100,000; and @ratwizardx made a profit of over $67,000.

data.title: Libra Token Displayed on Moonshot Platform Without Verification
data.description: According to Odaily, several community members have reported that the LIBRA token was showcased on the Moonshot platform without official verification. The token utilized the platform's recent 'token registration feature' for its display. This feature allows users to search for projects via token contracts, but the Moonshot platform has not verified these tokens and has issued corresponding warnings.

data.title: Yesterday, the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF had a net inflow of $11.7 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Farside Investors, the US Ethereum spot ETF had a net inflow of US$11.7 million yesterday, of which only Fidelity FETH had a net inflow of US$11.7 million, and the net inflow and outflow of other ETFs were all 0.

data.title: Yesterday, the U.S. Bitcoin spot ETF had a net inflow of $70.6 million
LIBRA tokens are only registered on Moonshot and not verified on the platform. This is the latest feature of the platform
data.description: According to feedback from many community members, LIBRA tokens were not previously certified by the Moonshot platform, but were displayed using the platform's recent "token registration function". This function supports searching for corresponding projects through token contracts, but the Moonshot platform has not officially verified this and has been marked with a corresponding warning.

data.title: DAF Insights – Key Crypto Trends To Watch in 2025
data.description:
As we’ve entered 2025, the digital asset industry is at a turning point. Regulatory clarity is improving, institutional adoption is growing, and new technologies are reshaping how we think about finance. However, challenges remain, particularly in global policy coordination, retail customer protection and infrastructure development. Many industry leaders highlighted key trends that will define...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/14/daf-insights-key-crypto-trends-to-watch-in-2025/

data.title: The team behind LIBRA has cashed out $107 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to LookOnChain monitoring, 8 wallets related to the LIBRA team obtained 57.6 million USDC and 249,671 SOL (approximately US$49.7 million) by adding liquidity, removing liquidity and collecting fees, with a total cash out of approximately US$107 million.

data.title: LIBRA falls below $0.2, market value temporarily reported at $180 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to GMGN data, the price of LIBRA tokens previously released by Argentine President Mile's X platform account fell below $0.2, temporarily reported at $0.18, and the market value was temporarily reported at $180 million. Earlier news, Mile posted on the X platform that he did not understand the token project and had nothing to do with the company behind the project.
Odaily reminds that the Meme coin market is very risky, and investors are advised to participate with caution.

data.title: KIP Protocol: LIBRA is a private enterprise project, and Argentine President Milley did not participate in its development
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News KIP Protocol official posted on the X platform that "the Viva la Libertad project aims to help Argentine private enterprises, and the LIBRA token has also achieved some success. To solve unnecessary problems: We want to clarify that this is a private enterprise project, and President Mile is not involved in the development of the project, as he himself mentioned. This is a completely private enterprise project."
